name: Intro
context: The signup page is visible with email and submit controls ready.
narration: Here's the signup page we'll use for this walkthrough.

name: Enter email
context: The email field is focused. This value is example data for the recording.
narration: Enter your email address. This becomes the account login.

name: Submit
context: The form is complete and ready to submit. A success message appears afterward.
narration: Click Submit. The account is created.
